name: Biscotti's
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs until light and fluffy.
2. Add sugar and anise to the beaten eggs.
3. Gradually add the first amount of flour, cherries, chopped nuts, and softened butter to the egg mixture.
4. Mix in the remaining flour and baking powder into the cake batter.
5. Shape the dough into 3 long loaves on a buttered and floured cookie sheet using a wooden spoon.
6. Indent slightly in the middle of each loaf.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and cut each loaf into 1/2-inch slices.
9. Return the sliced loaves to the pan and toast on both sides at 475°F (245°C) until brown, about 5 minutes. Watch closely to prevent burning.
